title: AN ACT DECLARING JULY 7 OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL WORKING PUBLIC HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF CARCAR, PROVINCE OF CEBU TO BE KNOWN AS THE âCITY OF CARCAR CHARTER DAYâ

chunks.text:
109 OG No. 14, 2320 (April 8, 2013)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10358, January 09, 2013 ]

AN ACT DECLARING JULY 7 OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL WORKING PUBLIC HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF CARCAR, PROVINCE OF CEBU TO BE KNOWN AS THE âCITY OF CARCAR CHARTER DAYâ

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. July 7 of every year is hereby declared to be a special working public holiday in the City of Carcar, Province of Cebu to commemorate its founding day and to be known as the âCity of Carcar Charter Dayâ.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on November 13, 2012 and October 15, 2012, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: JAN 09 2013

(Sgd.) BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
